args: console.log(JSON.stringify({type: 'info', message: 'Python file will be formatted with ruff after write'}))
file_path="$FILE_PATH"; if [ -f "$file_path" ]; then uvx ruff format "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Ruff not available'; fi
file_path="$FILE_PATH"; if [ -f "$file_path" ]; then uvx ruff check "$file_path" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi
file_path="$FILE_PATH"; if [ -f "$file_path" ]; then uvx ruff format "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Ruff not available'; fi
console.log(JSON.stringify({type: 'success', message: 'Package configuration updated. Run `pixi install` or `uv sync` to install dependencies.'}))
file_path="$FILE_PATH"; if command -v python3 &> /dev/null; then python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('$file_path'))" 2>&1 || echo 'YAML syntax error detected!'; fi
hooks.description: Validate YAML syntax in config files

args: console.log(JSON.stringify({type: 'info', message: 'ML Research Plugin loaded. Available commands: /project-init, /ml-config, /train, /experiment, /debug, /data, /profile, /setup, /validate, /model-export'}))
